content.en:
A very long time has passed.

this day.

Ye Tian was at a critical moment, he seemed to have disintegrated all the ultimate ways in his body, refined the most primitive ultimate rule particles, and was constructing the most primitive ultimate particles in his body, and the ultimate particles that had never appeared before.

He wants to construct a new ultimate path with this ultimate particle, and then use himself as the source to cultivate this ultimate path.

Gradually, Ye Tian's ultimate path was about to be constructed.

Rumble!!!!

Ye Tian's Ultimate Dao's original structure appeared, and it also made huge changes in itself.

Immediately afterward, he began to refine the structure, incorporating the essence of the ultimate way into it, and perfecting it step by step.

And it took him a long time to do this. "One-two-three"

"Hey, he really did it!"

Doomsday Supreme Venerable paid attention to Ye Tian's situation and was immediately shocked.

He didn't have much expectation for Ye Tian, but he never expected Ye Tian to create the ultimate way at this level.

Although the ultimate way created by Ye Tian is still very immature and can only be regarded as a prototype, it has at least made a start, and the probability of becoming the ultimate supreme in the future is extremely high.

"Doomsday Extreme, congratulations, now it seems that you have a high probability of winning!" "Shadow Sand Extreme Venerable" said, "Sure enough, it's better to choose in the end, and you have enough choice." "

"Not necessarily, in case other Eternal Rank Ultimate Realm Masters explode in the back, it is also possible to get out of the Ultimate Tower one step ahead of the Ten Thousand Law Extreme Venerable!" said the Doomsday Extreme Venerable.

Shadow Sand Extreme Venerable smiled lightly and didn't say anything, the probability of Doomsday Extreme Venerable saying it was too low, almost non-existent.

However, he doesn't care about winning or losing, if he loses, he loses, and the next time he wins back, it's a big deal.

......

Another period of time has passed.

Ye Tian initially created his own ultimate way, which he named the ultimate way of ten thousand laws.

But at this time, he still did not leave here.

"It seems that I misunderstood the purpose of this assessment. "

Ye Tian said darkly.

But it didn't matter, he had already roughly guessed the purpose of this assessment, so he tried to fuse the two ultimate ways, with the foundation of the ultimate way of ten thousand laws that he had created now, it was naturally very simple to fuse the two ultimate ways.

It didn't take long for him to successfully fuse the Ultimate Dao of Demon Hell and the Ultimate Dao of the Polar Day, forming a special kind of Ultimate Rule Particle, which is just a common sense of creating the Ultimate Dao by himself, and he has already created it himself, so he doesn't care about this fusion process.

Airplanes!!!!

A portal opened.

"Sure enough, I guessed the assessment requirements wrong, but the result was good. "

The fourth floor of the Ultimate Tower.

When Ye Tian came here, there were already several Immortal-level Ultimate Realm Masters here.

When they saw Ye Tian, they were a little surprised.

"Wanfa Jizun, are you still on the fourth layer, I thought you went to the fifth layer?"

An Immortal-level Ultimate Realm Lord asked curiously.

"I've only just entered the fourth floor, and I've been stuck on the third floor for some years. Ye Tian said.

"Ten Thousand Laws Extreme Venerable is not in a hurry, take your time!" another Eternal Rank Ultimate Realm Lord comforted.

Ye Tian didn't explain, after coming to the fourth layer, let's take a look at what the fate of this layer has.

Soon, he discovered that the fate of the fourth layer of the Ultimate Tower was a special energy, and after absorption, it could strengthen the Ultimate Body.

Of course, the effect of this growth is mediocre.

But for Ye Tian, this kind of energy can help him quickly cultivate the ultimate body of ten thousand laws!

Ye Tian was ready to reshape his physical body and condense the ultimate body of ten thousand laws.

Immediately, he began to absorb this energy and cultivate the ultimate body of ten thousand laws.

Since he created the ultimate path by himself, he directly comprehended the ultimate rules of the Ten Thousand Laws, and could directly cultivate the ultimate body of the Ten Thousand Laws.

With the passage of time, Ye Tian's Ten Thousand Laws Ultimate Body gradually condensed, although the increase in strength was not large, but after the Ten Thousand Laws Ultimate Body was cultivated, it could also be fused with other Ultimate Bodies, and when cultivated to the extreme, there would only be one kind of Ultimate Body left, that is, the Ten Thousand Laws Ultimate Body.

After a long time.

Ye Tian's Ten Thousand Laws Ultimate Body gradually grew to the Xiaocheng realm, and the Ten Thousand Laws Ultimate Rules also increased a little, which also made his own comprehension of the Ten Thousand Laws Ultimate Dao deeper and more perfect.

Rumble!!!!!

The ultimate body of ten thousand laws has been completed!

Except for the Demon Hell Ultimate Body, the other Ultimate Bodies were absorbed and fused by Ye Tian and turned into a part of the Ten Thousand Laws Ultimate Body.

"The fourth layer won't help me much, let's go to the fifth layer!"

Ye Tian went to break through.

He thought that the level from the fourth to the fifth layer would be difficult, but after he went, he found that if he wanted to pass this layer, he only needed to withstand a group of projection attacks to break through this level.

Ye Tian's Demon Hell Ultimate Body is complete, plus the Ten Thousand Laws Ultimate Body is even more powerful than the Demon Hell Ultimate Body, because this is the ultimate way he created, it is the most suitable for himself, everything is under his control, and his control over the Ten Thousand Laws Ultimate Body is more than a hundred times that of the Demon Hell Ultimate Body.

Therefore, Ye Tian's combat power exerted through the Ultimate Body of Ten Thousand Laws was even stronger.

Thundered!!!

A group of projection attacks were directly exploded by Ye Tian, and with the Ultimate Body of Ten Thousand Laws and the Ultimate Body of Demon Hell, he easily swept here, came to the end of this ultimate void, and after passing through, entered the fifth layer.

There were also three Eternal Rank Ultimate Realm Masters on the fifth layer, but they were also trapped here, and they hadn't gone to the sixth layer yet.

There is a ray of light on the fifth layer, as if it presents the origin of all the ultimate rules, and the enlightenment can raise 1.2 liters of the ultimate rule.

Ye Tian was here to comprehend the ultimate rules, improve his own ultimate rules of the Demon Hell, and the ultimate rules of ten thousand laws.

At the same time, he can also refine his ultimate path of ten thousand laws.

I have to say that since he created the ultimate way of ten thousand laws, his strength has improved too quickly, and it is too easy to pass the major levels, it is like a hanging.

With the passage of time, Ye Tian's ultimate rules of ten thousand laws are constantly improving, the ultimate rules of the Demon Hell are also improving, and his strength is also rapidly improving.

Finally, on this day, the ultimate rule of ten thousand laws has been raised to a level no less than the ultimate rule of the demon hell, and he has also perfected the ultimate way of ten thousand laws, and the ultimate body of ten thousand laws is about to break through to the realm of perfection.

Once he breaks through, his strength will reach an extremely terrifying level, and he can completely fuse with the ultimate body of the Demon Hell.
